title: CineFOV
description: CineFOV enhances the Minecraft camera experience with dynamic field of view adjustments, smooth zooming, and customizable motion-based effects for a more cinematic feel.
body:
# CineFOV **CineFOV** is a client-side mod for Minecraft that enhances the camera's field of view (FOV) with smooth transitions, dynamic zoom, and cinematic motion effects. Perfect for immersive gameplay, aesthetic builds, or content creation. ![CineFOV Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faca2198d760ce07fb2641369bc16be6b2888c60.jpeg) --- ## ✨ Features - 🎥 Dynamic FOV based on: - Player movement - Vertical motion (jumping/falling) - Head rotation - 🔍 Smooth zoom with: - Scroll wheel - Adjustable damping - 🎯 Mouse sensitivity adjustment while zoomed - 🌀 Optional vertical camera inertia - 🎬 Cinematic look with smooth transitions - 🧩 Full ModMenu integration --- ## 🔧 Settings Overview
General - **Enable Mod:** ON/OFF toggle - **Mouse FOV:** Enable or disable FOV based on mouse movement - **Vertical Head Motion:** Enable vertical camera movement based on pitch - **Dynamic FOV:** Slider to control base dynamic FOV strength ![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/029f33be292cb31b89ffb8d37e9cd74c462b3ae3_0.webp)
FOV Settings - **Mouse FOV Force:** Strength of FOV change when rotating - **Mouse FOV Speed:** Speed of interpolation for mouse-based FOV - **Zoom Speed:** Controls smoothness of zoom transitions - **Movement FOV Force:** Controls how much movement affects FOV ![FOV Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fa8d22c1450feae494054b5544829678727ad57_0.webp)
About CineFOV enhances camera FOV behavior with: - Dynamic FOV based on movement, vertical motion, and head rotation - Smooth zoom with scroll and damping - Optional vertical camera inertia - Mouse sensitivity adjustment while zooming - Cinematic look with smooth transitions ![About Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97cb35ed264617fb7100741cc80bb0162d8283f9_0.webp)
Keybinds - **Toggle CineFOV GUI** - **Toggle Smooth Camera** - **Zoom** _All keybinds are fully rebindable._ ![CineFOV Bind Parameters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4008d36b57e48c2447c92ca23fb6fa3d7f43e712_0.webp)
🌐 Language Support This mod includes full translations for **27 languages**: - Arabic - Czech - Danish - German - Greek - English - Spanish - Finnish - French - Hungarian - Indonesian - Italian - Japanese - Korean - Dutch - Norwegian - Polish - Portuguese (Brazil) - Romanian - Russian - Swedish - Thai - Turkish - Ukrainian - Vietnamese - Chinese (Simplified) - Chinese (Traditional)
